title: EMRS Pakur – Guest Teacher – 20 Posts

basic_details.job_title: EMRS Pakur Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Eklavya Model Residential Schools Pakur (EMRS Pakur) Recruitment 2026 for 20 posts of Guest Teacher. Candidates with B.Ed Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through EMRS Pakur official website pakur.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate trained teacher with B.Ed and CTET Paper-2 (Class VI-VIII) or STET, Graduate in Music or Diploma in Music, Graduate in Physical Education

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EMRS Pakur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
